hero.title: Innovative Bioenergy Solutions for a Sustainable Tomorrow
hero.description: We transform biomass waste into clean energy and valuable resources, creating a positive impact on people and the planet.

about.title: Driving the Transition Towards a Cleaner, Greener Future
about.description: Bio Trend Energy is at the forefront of clean-energy innovation. We design, build and operate advanced bioenergy systems that convert biomass waste into renewable energy and sustainable by-products.
about.story: Our approach combines engineering excellence with local insight. Every project is developed around resource efficiency, measurable impact and long-term operational reliability.
about.missionText: Deliver sustainable bioenergy solutions that empower communities, protect the environment and drive economic growth.
about.visionText: A world where waste is a resource and clean energy is accessible to all.

solutions.title: Our Solutions
solutions.description: End-to-end bioenergy solutions built around your resources, requirements and long-term goals.

items.title: Biomass Power Plants
items.description: High-efficiency biomass power plants for reliable and renewable energy.

items.title: Waste to Energy
items.description: Converting agricultural and industrial waste into clean energy.

items.title: Biogas Solutions
items.description: Advanced biogas systems for industry, communities and agriculture.

items.title: Biochar Production
items.description: Turning biomass into biochar for soil health and carbon capture.

items.title: Energy Consulting
items.description: Expert consulting for feasibility, design and project implementation.

items.title: Operation & Maintenance
items.description: Reliable operational performance and long-term plant care.

process.title: Our Process
process.description: A proven process that converts waste into clean energy, built for consistent performance from source to supply.

steps.title: Feedstock Collection
steps.description: We source biomass waste from agriculture, industries and forestry.

steps.title: Processing
steps.description: The biomass is sorted, dried and processed to ensure maximum efficiency.

steps.title: Conversion
steps.description: Advanced technology converts biomass into clean, usable energy.

steps.title: Energy Generation
steps.description: Reliable renewable energy is generated for industries and communities.

steps.title: By-Products
steps.description: Valuable by-products such as biochar and organic fertilizer are produced.

projects.title: Projects That Perform
projects.description: Delivering successful bioenergy projects that create lasting environmental and economic value.

impact.title: Our Impact
impact.description: Creating a positive impact on the environment, economy and society with every project we deliver.
impact.sdgText: Contributing to a cleaner environment and resilient communities.

footer.description: Transforming biomass waste into clean energy for a healthier planet and a more resilient future.
